findings.message: New database query path with no observable metrics or tracing. The get_item_by_name() function performs a SELECT query without instrumentation for latency measurement or query count tracking, and has no explicit limit/pagination controls.
findings.suggestion: Add OpenTelemetry span instrumentation or metrics recording around this query to capture latency and row count, or ensure the query has explicit pagination/limit controls. Consider using a database instrumentation library (e.g., opentelemetry-instrumentation-sqlalchemy) or wrapping the query with latency metrics recording similar to how the HTTP middleware records request latency.
